title: Paper Collection
description: Array of Paper records. Each element: A paper published at a tracked conference, with artifact badges and citation data.

Paper.description: A paper published at a tracked conference, with artifact badges and citation data.

id.description: Stable integer ID (starts at 1). Assigned once and preserved across pipeline runs.
id.title: Id

title.description: Full paper title as found in DBLP proceedings.
examples: Understanding and Detecting Software Upgrade Failures in Distributed Systems
title.title: Title

year.description: Publication year (2017–2030), e.g. 2023. Null if unknown.
year.title: Year

category.description: Research domain: 'systems' or 'security'. Empty string if not yet classified.
category.title: Category

badges.description: Artifact evaluation badges, e.g. ['Available', 'Functional', 'Reproduced']. Empty if no artifact.
badges.title: Badges

artifact_citations.description: Number of citations to this paper's artifact DOI. 0 if not tracked or no artifact.
artifact_citations.title: Artifact Citations

has_artifact.description: True if this paper has an evaluated artifact, false for papers without artifacts.
has_artifact.title: Has Artifact

Paper.title: Paper
